creator: ports.maintainer@evilphi.com
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #8)

I created a new PR because FreeBSD's bugzilla has a long-standing problem where a maintainer can't adequately modify a PR if they don't own it.  Additionally, others had already put updating notes and information in this PR and I didn't want to deal with a committer grabbing the wrong information as I have seen happen numerous times before.

Please close this bug as superceded by 257689.
